Detected Solution Path

  1. Defeat 3 Lieutenant Xhaveris lvl 84, Lieutenant Commander Gerhavis lvl 85, Commander Zherghur lvl 88, Captain Xhargrefh lvl 120, Commodore Herivis lvl 122, Rear Admiral Vorghis lvl 124, Vice Admiral Ahrgeris lvl 126, Admiral Zhersis lvl 130.

Quest Text

Description

The Nexar replace their admirals as fast as we can get people to kill them, see if you can throw them into confusion by taking out a few at once.

Completion

No completion text was exposed for this quest.
